creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: @kp I wonder where is an appropriate place to document that combining firewalls may not have desired results. pfil.9 seems to be the only general page (firewall agnostic) but a section 9 page isn't right for this. I guess firewall.7 should be rewritten to describe pf (and ipfilter) as well as ipfw, and then this issue could be added there.
